title: Air New Zealand purchases 30 million litres of Sustainable Aviation Fuel
content: Air New Zealand has today announced its largest purchase of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) to date, securing more than 30 million litres from Neste to be uplifted from Los Angeles and San Francisco through to February 2026. This volume of SAF will deliver up to an 80% reduction in carbon emissions across its lifecycle compared with jet fuel made from fossil fuels. This SAF is manufactured by Neste in Singapore from 100% renewable waste and residue raw materials such as animal fat waste and used cooking oil.
author: Analysts Account
